title: 夢の続きへ駆け出して

text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and Biwa Hayahide are staring out
across the track, having finished preparations for
their special race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The track's set, and we have a rough estimate of
the turnout. All that's left is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Figuring out who's gonna race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As it's the Fan Fest, this can't be any
ordinary race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So we gotta give the fans the matchup they want
most.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...What about a one-on-one between Teio and
McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A showdown between a once-in-a-generation
genius and a prodigy of distinguished lineage is
bound to draw a crowd. Another possible
matchup would be...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A fight to reign supreme between the Emperor
Symboli Rudolf and another individual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think Maruzensky could take her on. Or we
could have a Triple Crown event. A dream race
with Mr. C.B....

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, the list goes on. Do you have any ideas as
to who the most crowd-pleasing racers might be?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Only one combo comes to mind. They're the best
of the best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? Who in the world could you be referring to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That fancy brain of yours on sleep mode or
something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think's standing right here? Just a
couple of regular old runners?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Do you mean to say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The theory wiz awakens. That's right, a clash
between the world's mightiest sisters!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But! You wish to have our showdown here?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a little sooner than we thought, but it'd
be pretty cool to see who's strongest right now,
right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it, people have been asking about it. This should have been my first thought.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Or perhaps... I may have been deliberately
putting it out of mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So how 'bout it, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do you even need to ask? I've been waiting for
this a long time.
The day of the long-awaited race finally arrives...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There are more people here than I expected... It
seems I miscalculated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Goes to show how many people were waiting to
see this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You good?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've not a flicker of doubt standing beside you. I
feel absolutely amazing. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'd be lying if I said I felt the same as always.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But it's a change for the better. I've ripped down
countless barriers... I've suffered through a lot...
but I'm standing here now. That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad you're feeling well. It'd be a pity if
you weren't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Meaning?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's simple. I formulated my winning equation
under the assumption that you'd be in top running
condition!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, did you now? Well I'm gonna tear that
equation to shreds!
Ka-chak!
Wooooo!

The race proves to be a truly spectacular contest
that remains a vivid memory for all who witness it.
